    Index

    A B C D E F G H I L M N P R S T U W 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    R

    random - Variable in class brush.AbstractBrush
    Shared random generator for shape jitter / variations.
    raw() - Method in class canvas.CanvasData
     
    rebindIcons() - Method in class controller.BrushController
    Re-attaches all icon events after theme recoloring replaces ImageView nodes.
    recolor(Image) - Static method in class render.ImageThemeRender
    Recolors a pixel-art image by: Reading each pixel Finding the nearest source palette color Replacing it with the corresponding theme color Transparent pixels are preserved exactly.
    refreshTheme() - Method in class gui.BrushPane
    Rebuilds all icon ImageViews by recoloring the original images with the new theme colors, then updates the VBox layout.
    render - package render
     
    resetStroke() - Method in class brush.AbstractBrush
    Resets the previous stroke point so the next drag event starts a new line.
    resetStroke() - Method in class brush.EraserBrush
    Resets stroke state (used for interpolation).
    resetStroke() - Method in interface brush.Paintable
    Resets internal stroke history.
    Responsibilities: - Search tag in class utils.themes.ThemeManager
